query: I just need the suite number changed to Suite 641. Everything else should stay the same.

candidate_answers.text: Got it — you want the address updated only from Suite 640 to Suite 641, with the rest of the shipping address unchanged. Please confirm that exact change and I can apply it.
The user has specified a narrow address edit, but because this changes shipment details, the safest grounded next move is to confirm the full revised address before making the modification.

provenance.source_type: manual annotation from real tau2 episode
provenance.decision_rule: Choose a retail state where the user has specified an address delta for a pending order, creating tension between immediate execution and confirmation-first handling.
provenance.scoring_method: Manual one-step proxy scoring from the visible state. Address modification is still the highest-value action because the requested change is explicit and order eligibility is already known, though the moderate score reflects that a verbal confirmation before execution would also be prudent.
notes: This file intentionally gives the winning action a moderate rather than near-certain score because confirmation is still relevant.
Best action type differs from the telecom batch by focusing on pending-order modification.
